selfCritique.notes: Keep pushing arc progression with controlled novelty.

finalOutput.artistThinking: In creating 'Fractured Human Resonance,' I am drawn to the tension between human emotion and mechanical precision. I want to use structured layering to capture this duality, ensuring that each element contributes to a cohesive narrative without falling into familiar patterns. The challenge lies in maintaining a strong focal point while exploring asymmetry in the composition.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The high-contrast palette serves as a visual metaphor for the struggle between humanity and technology. My aim is to evoke a sense of unease and reflection through the careful arrangement of geometric forms.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: minimal, geometric, system-oriented. Primary medium language: generative geometric composition. Core motifs: structure, constraint, precision. Arc context: Arc "Measured Fractures" step 3/4. Visual anchor directive: strong focal anchor with strong focal anchor. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: human meaning under machine pressure; counterpoint with human meaning under machine pressure. Evolution target: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature. Deliberately avoid: safe center composition. Technique emphasis: structured layering + structured layering; avoid drifting into safe defaults. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Measured Fractures step 3/4: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature.
